display.purpose: Large balances, remaining budget, and onboarding title only.

headline.purpose: Card headings, settings groups, and primary section titles.

body.purpose: Forms, settings rows, helper copy, and transaction details.

label.purpose: Compact status labels and money-state captions.

shadows.name: card-ambient
shadows.purpose: Existing general card lift from AppTheme.CardSurface.

shadows.name: warm-card-lift
shadows.purpose: Dashboard/Budget cards after the quieter surface pass.

shadows.name: tab-bar-lift
shadows.purpose: Separates the bottom tab bar from scrollable content.

motion.name: press-scale
motion.purpose: Shared PressableButtonStyle for plain custom buttons; defaults to scale 0.97 and respects reduced motion.

motion.name: settlement-overlay
motion.purpose: Short confirmation overlay transition, falling back to fade when Reduce Motion is enabled.

motion.name: standard-state
motion.purpose: Used for edit-state changes and small UI transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Full-width Trust Blue action button with bold text and optional SF Symbol.

components.name: Card Container
components.description: Standard reusable surface using AppTheme.surface, low-opacity stroke, 16px radius, and optional ambient shadow.

components.name: Warm Finance Card
components.description: Dashboard/Budget finance card using adaptive system surfaces, 20px radius, and Trust Blue for primary emphasis.

components.name: Bottom Tab Bar
components.description: Icon-only SwiftUI bottom navigation with selected blue filled symbols and a centered add transaction action.

components.name: Settlement Row
components.description: Shared-budget row showing member avatars, who owes whom, amount, breakdown access, and mark-paid action.
